---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

### 1. testfiles

#### 1.1 validate inputs — returns lightweight IsoEMInput object


```{r}
library(IsoEM)
counts_f <- "../../../01.test_data/mm39_brain/SAMEA117622252/OUT_mm39_SAMEA117622252.transcript_model_reads.tsv.gz"
gtf_f    <- "../../../01.test_data/mm39_brain/SAMEA117622252/OUT_mm39_SAMEA117622252.transcript_models.gtf"

input <- prepare_isoem(
  counts_file = counts_f,
  gtf_file    = gtf_f,
  mode        = "bulk_single",
  sample_id   = "SAMEA117622252",
  outdir      = "output"
)
print(input)


# Step 2: build equivalence classes
ec <- build_ec(input, n_cores = 1, verbose = FALSE)
print(ec)

# Step 3: run EM
result <- run_em(ec, n_cores = 6, verbose = FALSE)
print(result)

# Inspect counts table
head(result$counts[, .(transcript_id, gene_id, em_count, tpm, certainty)])


```
